summary: Comprehensive testing of MNG Kargo API integration and cargo label generation features. Backend: 19/19 tests passed. Frontend: All tested features working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created test order FC1774152575 with MNG shipment for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: MNG Kargo integration fully tested and working. Key findings: 1) /api/orders/{id}/cargo-label returns HTML label with 10cm x 15cm dimensions, top and bottom barcodes, sender/receiver/cargo info sections. 2) /api/orders/bulk-labels returns multiple labels with page breaks for printing. 3) /api/orders/{id}/create-mng-shipment creates MNG shipment and returns tracking number. 4) Admin Orders page has 'MNG ile Gönder' button (for orders without cargo), 'Etiket Yazdır' button (for orders with cargo), and 'Toplu Etiket Yazdır' button in bulk actions bar.

features_tested.cargo_label_endpoint: PASS - Returns HTML with correct 10cm x 15cm dimensions
features_tested.cargo_label_top_barcode: PASS - Contains base64 encoded barcode image at top
features_tested.cargo_label_bottom_barcode: PASS - Contains base64 encoded barcode image at bottom
features_tested.cargo_label_sender_info: PASS - Contains 'Gönderici Bilgileri' section with FACETTE company info
features_tested.cargo_label_receiver_info: PASS - Contains 'Alıcı Bilgileri' section with customer details
features_tested.cargo_label_cargo_info: PASS - Contains 'Kargo Bilgileri' section with cargo company, payment type, package count
features_tested.bulk_labels_endpoint: PASS - Returns HTML with multiple labels and page breaks
features_tested.mng_shipment_endpoint: PASS - Creates MNG shipment and returns tracking number
features_tested.cargo_companies_endpoint: PASS - Returns list of cargo companies including MNG
features_tested.order_tracking_endpoint: PASS - Returns tracking info for orders with cargo
features_tested.admin_mng_button: PASS - 'MNG ile Gönder' button visible for orders without cargo
features_tested.admin_label_button: PASS - 'Etiket Yazdır' button visible for orders with cargo
features_tested.admin_bulk_label_button: PASS - 'Toplu Etiket Yazdır' button visible in bulk actions bar

mocked_apis.mng_kargo_api: NOTE - MNG Kargo SOAP API integration exists but may fallback to local tracking number generation if API fails
